description: 林逸 — 現代玩家穿越者，核心系統持有者。平靜/無聊的表情，帶著一絲「又來了」的無奈感。
prompt: anime style male cultivator, young man early 20s, amber/gold themed casual robes with subtle circuit-line patterns, slightly messy dark hair, round glasses giving a nerdy-gamer vibe, calm slightly bored expression with a hint of exasperation, hands in pockets, half-body portrait, transparent background, solid magenta #FF00FF background
